_comment: SYNTHETIC test fixture for the Skill 60 EWS sentinel test suite. No client data. subtractive-misconfig: identical to baseline-clean.json EXCEPT agents.defaults.compaction.memoryFlush.softThresholdTokens is set to 900000, larger than the _contextWindow hint below (128000). effective ceiling = contextWindow - softThresholdTokens <= 0, the exact S3 broken-config case (config/monitored-keys.json: compaction.memoryFlush.softThresholdTokens, severity=P1_on_broken_arithmetic). This is a P1 to the OPERATOR under D5 -- NOT the running-low case, which never reaches the operator. See tests/fixtures/README.md and tests/drills/D-S3.md.
